Headline: #4 Cottage Grove Temporary Southbound Reroute near Cottage Grove/89th
ShortDescription: SB #4 Cottage Grove buses are rerouted via Cottage Grove, 87th, King Drive, 95th, then resume their normal route due to police activity near Cottage Grove/89th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted via Cottage Grove, 87th, King Drive, 95th, then resume their normal route.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near Cottage Grove/89th.
